quoted_text: Just because stranded cargoes are leaving Hormuz doesn’t mean there is a glut in the market, the fact that stock levels are low and China’s imports also have been lower is all indications that restocking will happen. Overall the average exports for June from Hormuz was around 5.8 million bpd. Don’t fall for the mega glut narrative. #OOTT
